summary: Physical signals are directionally consistent with elevated smoke concern during the mission window.

findings.title: Modeled PM remained elevated
findings.summary: Modeled PM2.5 was elevated through the window and peaked on 2026-03-19.

open_questions: Should local station measurements be added for stronger corroboration?

recommended_next_actions.objective: Add OpenAQ or local station evidence for Chiang Mai if available in the same window.
